import { Subscriber } from '../Subscriber'; /** * Subscribes to an ArrayLike with a subscriber * @param array The array or array-like to subscribe to */ export const subscribeToArray = <T>(array: ArrayLike<T>) => (subscriber: Subscriber<T>) => { for (let i = 0, len = array.length; i < len && !subscriber.closed; i++) { subscriber.next(array[i]); } subscriber.complete(); };
